2025-26 Rider Broncs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 4-25 (3-17, 13th in MAAC MBB)

Coach: Kevin Baggett

PS/G: 63.4 (361st of 365)

PA/G: 76.0 (237th of 365)

SRS: -19.19 (353rd of 365)

SOS: -5.04 (260th of 365)

ORtg: 96.3 (355th of 365)

DRtg: 115.3 (343rd of 365)
